hook.text: Do you think you have endometres of denomyosis?
hook.target_audience_raw: Patients with suspected or diagnosed endometriosis/adenomyosis seeking guidance

main_claim.text: Patients can access an online clinic to receive a personalized management plan and help navigating the next steps of their care.

supporting_explanation.summary: The clinic helps patients understand symptom impact and provides medical, surgical, and lifestyle options (like physiotherapy) to improve quality of life.

funnel_rationale: The video targets users who likely already know they have an issue but are confused about diagnosis or 'where to go next', positioning the specialist clinic as the middle-funnel solution before a final BOFU booking.

cta.wording: Book your appointment with her, link in bio.
cta.value_exchange_raw: Access to a Clinical Nurse Specialist with 20 years of experience
